# Multiclass Archetype / Dedication Feats (PF2e Remastered)

Complete reference of all multiclass archetype dedication feats for 8 classes: Animist, Commander, Exemplar, Guardian, Gunslinger, Inventor, Summoner, Thaumaturge.

Sources: [Archives of Nethys](https://2e.aonprd.com/) — War of Immortals, Battlecry!, Guns & Gears, Secrets of Magic, Dark Archives (Remastered)

---

# Animist (Multiclass Archetype)

Source: War of Immortals pg. 56
Archetype ID: 280

You have learned to commune with the spirits of the world, finding a path towards harmony with nature and the spiritual realm.

### Multiclass Animist Characters

Animist is a strong choice for characters who want to gain divine prepared spellcasting through a connection to wandering spirits called apparitions.

---

## Animist Dedication &mdash; Feat 2

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype, Dedication, Multiclass
- **Source:** War of Immortals pg. 56
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 7219
- **Prerequisites:** Wisdom +2

You have a deep connection with the spiritual world, making pacts with apparitions—beings of spiritual energy who partner with you by giving you a sliver of their power in exchange for a vessel. You become trained in Religion; if you were already trained in Religion, you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You become trained in divine spell attack modifier and divine spell DC.

You bond with an apparition, and you add the spells from the apparition's vessel spell list to those you can prepare. During your daily preparations, you can prepare two common divine cantrips, which are heightened to half your level rounded up. You gain the Cast a Spell activity. You're a prepared divine spellcaster. Your key spellcasting attribute is Wisdom.

- **Special:** You can't select another dedication feat until you have gained two other feats from the animist archetype.

---

## Basic Animist Spellcasting &mdash; Feat 4

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** War of Immortals pg. 56
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 7220
- **Prerequisites:** Animist Dedication

You gain the basic spellcasting benefits as a prepared divine spellcaster. Each time you gain a spell slot of a new rank from this archetype, you can also choose to prepare a spell from your apparition's vessel spell list (in addition to those on the divine spell list).

---

## Spiritual Awakening &mdash; Feat 4

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** War of Immortals pg. 56
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 7221
- **Prerequisites:** Animist Dedication

You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level animist feat.

---

## Animist's Power &mdash; Feat 6

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** War of Immortals pg. 56
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 7222
- **Prerequisites:** Spiritual Awakening

You gain one animist feat. For the purpose of meeting its prerequisites, your animist level is equal to half your character level. You can't gain wandering feats from this feat.

- **Special:** You can select this feat more than once. Each time you select it, you gain another animist feat.

---

## Apparition Magic &mdash; Feat 8

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** War of Immortals pg. 56
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 7223
- **Prerequisites:** Basic Animist Spellcasting

For each spell rank you can cast from the basic spellcasting benefits (not including your two highest ranks of spell slots), you gain 1 additional spell slot that you can use only to prepare a spell from your apparition's vessel spell list.

---

## Expert Animist Spellcasting &mdash; Feat 12

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** War of Immortals pg. 56
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 7224
- **Prerequisites:** Basic Animist Spellcasting; master in Religion

You gain the expert spellcasting benefits.

---

## Master Animist Spellcasting &mdash; Feat 18

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** War of Immortals pg. 56
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 7225
- **Prerequisites:** Expert Animist Spellcasting; legendary in Religion

You gain the master spellcasting benefits.

---

---

# Commander (Multiclass Archetype)

Source: Battlecry! pg. 52
Archetype ID: 322

You have an uncanny knack for directing and coordinating your allies on the battlefield.

### Multiclass Commander Characters

Characters who want to increase their tactical capabilities should consider the commander archetype. They can give their allies options for working together more effectively.

---

## Commander Dedication &mdash; Feat 2

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype, Dedication, Multiclass
- **Source:** Battlecry! pg. 52
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 7886
- **Prerequisites:** Intelligence +2

You gain the tactics class feature with a tactics folio containing two 1st-rank common tactics with the mobility or offensive trait. During your daily preparations, you can prepare one of your tactics, rather than the usual number. You gain a commander's banner: a 30-foot aura that activates when you roll initiative and lasts until the end of the encounter (you don't gain the bonus to Will saves against fear effects from the banner). You become trained in commander class DC and in Warfare Lore.

- **Special:** You can't select another dedication feat until you have gained two other feats from the commander archetype.

---

## Basic Field Training &mdash; Feat 4

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** Battlecry! pg. 52
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 7887
- **Prerequisites:** Commander Dedication

You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level commander feat.

---

## Tactical Excellence &mdash; Feat 4

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** Battlecry! pg. 52
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 7888
- **Prerequisites:** Commander Dedication

You add two new 1st-rank common tactics with the mobility or offensive trait to your tactics folio, and the maximum number of tactics you can prepare each day increases by 1. You can select this feat a second time at 8th level or higher. The second time, the tactics you can add can be expert-rank tactics in addition to 1st-rank tactics.

---

## Advanced Field Training &mdash; Feat 6

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** Battlecry! pg. 52
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 7889
- **Prerequisites:** Basic Field Training

You gain one commander feat. For the purpose of meeting its prerequisites, your commander level is equal to half your character level.

- **Special:** You can select this feat more than once. Each time you select it, you gain another commander feat.

---

## Officer's Expertise &mdash; Feat 12

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** Battlecry! pg. 52
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 7890
- **Prerequisites:** Commander Dedication

Your proficiency rank in commander class DC increases to expert, and your proficiency rank in Warfare Lore increases to expert.

---

## Officer's Mastery &mdash; Feat 18

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** Battlecry! pg. 52
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 7891
- **Prerequisites:** Officer's Expertise

Your proficiency rank in commander class DC increases to master, and your proficiency rank in Warfare Lore increases to master.

---

---

# Exemplar (Multiclass Archetype)

Source: War of Immortals pg. 57
Archetype ID: 281

You have awakened a tiny spark of divinity within yourself, either through your deeds or through exposure to a source of divine power. As you nurture this spark, you can become a potent divine combatant.

### Multiclass Exemplar Characters

The exemplar archetype grants access to great feats for characters who seek to gain a divine ikon and unlock a source of divine power that is not reliant on worship or spellcasting. It's particularly helpful for characters looking to add a potent weapon or item to their arsenal and enhance their combat capabilities.

---

## Exemplar Dedication &mdash; Feat 2

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Rare, Archetype, Dedication, Multiclass
- **Source:** War of Immortals pg. 57
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 7226
- **Prerequisites:** Strength +2, or Dexterity +2

A spark of inherent divine power has lit itself within you. You become trained in martial weapons. You gain one ikon from those listed on the ikons page, the ability to use the ikon's immanence and transcendence actions and effects, and the Shift Immanence action. Because you have only a single ikon, when you Spark Transcendence, your divine spark recedes back to the depths of your soul and must be recalled with Shift Immanence to re-empower your ikon. You become trained in exemplar class DC.

- **Special:** You can't select another dedication feat until you have gained two other feats from the exemplar archetype.

---

## Basic Glory &mdash; Feat 4

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** War of Immortals pg. 57
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 7227
- **Prerequisites:** Exemplar Dedication

You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level exemplar feat.

---

## Exemplar Resilency &mdash; Feat 4

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** War of Immortals pg. 57
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 7228
- **Prerequisites:** Exemplar Dedication; class granting no more Hit Points per level than 8 + your Constitution modifier

You gain 3 additional Hit Points for each exemplar archetype class feat you have. As you continue selecting exemplar archetype class feats, you continue to gain additional Hit Points in this way.

---

## Advanced Glory &mdash; Feat 6

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** War of Immortals pg. 57
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 7229
- **Prerequisites:** Basic Glory

You gain an exemplar feat. For the purpose of meeting its prerequisites, your exemplar level is equal to half your character level.

- **Special:** You can select this feat more than once. Each time you select it, you gain another exemplar feat.

---

## Exemplar Expertise &mdash; Feat 10

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** War of Immortals pg. 57
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 7230
- **Prerequisites:** Exemplar Dedication

Your soul has been further tempered in divine power. Your proficiency in exemplar class DC increases to expert.

---

## Second Ikon &mdash; Feat 12

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** War of Immortals pg. 57
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 7231
- **Prerequisites:** Exemplar Dedication

You gain an additional ikon, selected from those listed on the ikons page. When you Spark Transcendence, your spark moves automatically from the ikon you just used to the other ikon.

---

---

# Guardian (Multiclass Archetype)

Source: Battlecry! pg. 53
Archetype ID: 323

You've learned the advantages of wearing the sturdiest of armor and keeping your enemies' attention focused on you instead of your allies. You can eventually put yourself in harm's way to protect your friends.

### Multiclass Guardian Characters

Characters who want to increase their defensive capabilities should consider the guardian archetype. They can eventually take less damage from physical attacks and stop attacks meant for others.

---

## Guardian Dedication &mdash; Feat 2

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype, Dedication, Multiclass
- **Source:** Battlecry! pg. 53
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 7892
- **Prerequisites:** Strength +2; Constitution +2

You become trained in Athletics; if you were already trained in Athletics, you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You become trained in guardian class DC.

You become trained in light armor and medium armor. If you already were trained in light armor and medium armor, you gain training in heavy armor as well. Whenever you gain a class feature that grants you expert or greater proficiency in any type of armor (but not unarmored defense), you also gain that proficiency in the armor types granted to you by this feat. If you have a class feature that grants you expert proficiency in unarmored defense and you're 13th level or higher, you also become an expert in the armor types granted to you by this feat.

You can use the Taunt action.

- **Special:** You can't select another dedication feat until you have gained two other feats from the guardian archetype.

---

## Basic Defender &mdash; Feat 4

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** Battlecry! pg. 53
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 7893
- **Prerequisites:** Guardian Dedication

You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level guardian feat.

---

## Guardian Resiliency &mdash; Feat 4

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** Battlecry! pg. 53
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 7894
- **Prerequisites:** Guardian Dedication; class granting no more Hit Points than 10 + your Constitution modifier

You gain 3 additional Hit Points for each guardian archetype class feat you have. As you continue selecting guardian archetype class feats, you continue to gain additional Hit Points in this way.

---

## Advanced Defender &mdash; Feat 6

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** Battlecry! pg. 53
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 7895
- **Prerequisites:** Basic Defender

You gain one guardian feat. For the purpose of meeting its prerequisites, your guardian level is equal to half your character level.

- **Special:** You can select this feat more than once. Each time you select it, you gain another guardian feat.

---

## Guardian's Intercept &mdash; Feat 6

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** Battlecry! pg. 53
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 7896
- **Prerequisites:** Guardian Dedication

You can use the Intercept Attack reaction once per 10 minutes.

---

## Armored Resistance &mdash; Feat 8

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** Battlecry! pg. 53
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 7897
- **Prerequisites:** Guardian's Intercept

While you are wearing medium or heavy armor, you gain resistance to physical damage equal to half your character level when you use the Intercept Attack reaction to take damage instead of your ally.

---

## Ironclad Fortitude &mdash; Feat 12

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** Battlecry! pg. 53
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 7898
- **Prerequisites:** Guardian Dedication; expert in Fortitude saves

Your proficiency rank in Fortitude saves increases to master.

---

---

# Gunslinger (Multiclass Archetype)

Source: Guns & Gears pg. 127
Archetype ID: 114

You like a weapon that makes an impression almost as much as you like making an impression.

PFS Note: All Pathfinder Society agents have access to the Gunslinger archetype.

### Multiclass Gunslinger Characters

Gunslinger is a great fit for dexterous characters who want a weapon that hits hard from a distance, especially rangers and rogues. Spellcasters with sure strike, especially witches and bards with their one-action cantrips, might favor firearms with the fatal property and gunslinger abilities that improve options for supporting their allies.

---

## Gunslinger Dedication &mdash; Feat 2

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Uncommon, Archetype, Dedication, Multiclass
- **Source:** Guns & Gears pg. 127
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 3215
- **Prerequisites:** Dexterity +2

You excel in using specific types of ranged weapons. You have familiarity with martial crossbows and firearms, treating them as simple weapons for the purposes of proficiency. You gain access to uncommon martial and simple crossbows and firearms that do not have an ancestry trait. You become trained in gunslinger class DC.

Choose a gunslinger way. You become trained in your way's associated skill; if you were already trained in this skill, you become trained in a skill of your choice. You don't gain any other abilities from your choice of way.

- **Special:** You can't select another dedication feat until you have gained two other feats from the gunslinger archetype.

---

## Basic Shooting &mdash; Feat 4

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** Guns & Gears pg. 127
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 3216
- **Prerequisites:** Gunslinger Dedication

You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level gunslinger feat of your choice.

---

## Advanced Shooting &mdash; Feat 6

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** Guns & Gears pg. 127
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 3217
- **Prerequisites:** Basic Shooting

You gain one gunslinger feat. For the purpose of meeting its prerequisites, your gunslinger level is equal to half your level.

- **Special:** You can select this feat more than once. Each time you select it, you gain another gunslinger feat.

---

## Slinger's Readiness &mdash; Feat 6

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** Guns & Gears pg. 127
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 3218
- **Prerequisites:** Gunslinger Dedication

You've learned a gunslinger's tricks for staking out your territory in a fight. You gain the initial deed for the way you selected with Gunslinger's Dedication.

---

## Practiced Reloads &mdash; Feat 10

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** Guns & Gears pg. 127
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 3219
- **Prerequisites:** Gunslinger Dedication

You've mastered the reloading techniques and methods usually practiced by only the most dedicated firearm professionals. You gain the slinger's reload for the way you selected with Gunslinger's Dedication.

---

## Eagle Eye &mdash; Feat 12

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** Guns & Gears pg. 127
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 3220
- **Prerequisites:** Gunslinger Dedication; expert in Perception

Your practice with crossbows and firearms has sharpened your attention to detail. You become a master in Perception.

---

## Firearm Expert &mdash; Feat 12

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** Guns & Gears pg. 127
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 3221
- **Prerequisites:** Gunslinger Dedication; expert in any kind of weapon or unarmed attack

You've become an expert with your chosen weapons. Your proficiency ranks for simple and martial crossbows and simple and martial firearms increase to expert.

---

---

# Inventor (Multiclass Archetype)

Source: Guns & Gears pg. 49
Archetype ID: 108

You revel in the creation of clever inventions, deploying your brilliance to defeat your foes. Explosives, gadgets, and innovative technologies? You have ideas for all of them, and you're eager to test your theories.

PFS Note: All Pathfinder Society agents have access to the Inventor archetype.

### Multiclass Inventor Characters

Inventor is a great fit for intelligent characters looking to branch out and learn new tricks, especially alchemists, who are already good at Crafting and may appreciate unstable options as an alternative to daily alchemical resources. If they meet the Intelligence requirements, clerics of deities who encourage invention and experimentation like Brigh are an amazing fit, both because it makes narrative sense and because such characters can usually Refocus while fixing their innovation after using an unstable ability.

---

## Inventor Dedication &mdash; Feat 2

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Uncommon, Archetype, Dedication, Multiclass
- **Source:** Guns & Gears pg. 49
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 3112
- **Prerequisites:** Intelligence +2

You become trained in Crafting and inventor class DC. You gain the Inventor skill feat, even if you don't meet the skill feat's prerequisites. Choose an innovation (armor, construct, or weapon). You gain that innovation, though you don't gain any other abilities that affect your innovation at this time. You can use actions and abilities that specifically require your innovation, but you can't use actions or abilities that require you to modify or use that innovation, such as modifications or Explode.

- **Special:** You can't select another dedication feat until you have gained two other feats from the inventor archetype.

---

## Basic Breakthrough &mdash; Feat 4

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** Guns & Gears pg. 49
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 3113
- **Prerequisites:** Inventor Dedication

You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level inventor feat of your choice.

---

## Brilliant Crafter &mdash; Feat 4

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** Guns & Gears pg. 49
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 3114
- **Prerequisites:** Inventor Dedication

Your skill at crafting is unparalleled. You become an expert in Crafting. At 7th level you become a master in Crafting, and at 15th level, you become legendary in Crafting and you become an expert in your inventor class DC.

---

## Advanced Breakthrough &mdash; Feat 6

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** Guns & Gears pg. 49
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 3115
- **Prerequisites:** Basic Breakthrough

You gain one inventor feat. For the purpose of meeting its prerequisites, your inventor level is equal to half your character level.

- **Special:** You can select this feat more than once. Each time you select it, you gain another inventor feat.

---

## Explosion &mdash; Feat 6

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** Guns & Gears pg. 49
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 3116
- **Prerequisites:** Inventor Dedication

Your innovation can explode on command. You gain the Explode action.

---

## Basic Modification &mdash; Feat 8

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** Guns & Gears pg. 49
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 3117
- **Prerequisites:** Inventor Dedication

You've learned to modify your innovation in order to enhance its capabilities beyond what an ordinary piece of equipment can accomplish. You gain a basic modification of your choice for your innovation. Your innovation must meet any requirements for the modification you choose, as normal.

---

---

# Summoner (Multiclass Archetype)

Source: Secrets of Magic pg. 76
Archetype ID: 96
Legacy Content

You have a tenuous connection to an eidolon, a bodiless being that shares your life force, and with effort you can manifest the eidolon into the world.

### Multiclass Summoner Characters

The summoner archetype grants you an eidolon to join you in battle. It's a particularly helpful multiclass for characters with weaker martial abilities.

---

## Summoner Dedication &mdash; Feat 2

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype, Dedication, Multiclass
- **Source:** Secrets of Magic pg. 76
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 2953
- **Prerequisites:** Charisma 14
- **Legacy Content**

You've formed a bond with an eidolon, an entity that manifests in a physical body only through its link to your life force. Your bond may be tenuous, but that doesn't make your connection any less special. You gain an eidolon as well as the Manifest Eidolon activity. Due to your tenuous link, you can't gain or use tandem actions. Because you don't have Act Together, only you or your eidolon can perform an exploration activity at one time, so for instance you couldn't both be Searching or Investigating.

Your eidolon is trained in unarmed attacks and unarmored defense, and shares your proficiency rank for Perception, saving throws, and skill checks. Choose an eidolon type. You become trained in your eidolon's listed skills. For each of those skills that you are already trained in, you become trained in a different skill of your choice. Your eidolon's initial ability scores are reduced. It starts with a 16 in any ability score listed at 18 for its eidolon array. It otherwise gains the statistics listed for an eidolon of that type.

At 5th level, the eidolon's ability score that was reduced to 16 increases to 18, before applying ability boosts. At levels 5, 10, 15, and 20, your eidolon also gets four ability boosts, which follow the same rules as yours.

### Manifest Eidolon ◆◆◆ (3 actions)
- **Traits:** Concentrate, Conjuration, Manipulate, Summoner, Teleportation

Your eidolon appears in an open space adjacent to you, and can then take a single action. If your eidolon was already manifested, you unmanifest it instead. The conduit that allows your eidolon to manifest is also a tether between you. Your eidolon must remain within 100 feet of you at all times and can't willingly go beyond that limit. If forced beyond this distance, or if you are reduced to 0 Hit Points, your eidolon's physical form dissolves: your eidolon unmanifests, and you need to use Manifest Eidolon to manifest it again.

- **Special (Manifest Eidolon):** This activity has the trait matching your eidolon's tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).
- **Special:** You can't select another dedication feat until you have gained two other feats from the summoner archetype.

---

## Basic Synergy &mdash; Feat 4

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** Secrets of Magic pg. 76
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 2954
- **Prerequisites:** Summoner Dedication
- **Legacy Content**

You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level summoner feat of your choice.

---

## Initial Eidolon Ability &mdash; Feat 4

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** Secrets of Magic pg. 77
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 2955
- **Prerequisites:** Summoner Dedication
- **Legacy Content**

Your link to your eidolon becomes stronger, granting it a new ability. Your eidolon gains the initial ability for an eidolon of its type.

---

## Advanced Synergy &mdash; Feat 6

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** Secrets of Magic pg. 77
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 2956
- **Prerequisites:** Basic Synergy
- **Legacy Content**

You gain one summoner feat. For the purpose of meeting its prerequisites, your summoner level is equal to half your character level.

- **Special:** You can select this feat more than once. Each time you select it, you gain another summoner feat.

---

## Basic Summoner Spellcasting &mdash; Feat 6

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** Secrets of Magic pg. 77
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 2957
- **Prerequisites:** Summoner Dedication
- **Legacy Content**

You gain the basic bounded spellcasting benefits. You gain the Cast a Spell activity. Your key spellcasting ability for summoner archetype spells is Charisma, and they are summoner spells of your eidolon's tradition. You become trained in spell attack rolls and spell DCs of that tradition. You gain a spell repertoire and two cantrips. Each time you gain a spell slot of a new level from the summoner archetype, add a spell of that level or lower to your repertoire. Each time you lose spell slots of a particular level, remove those spells from your repertoire.

---

## Expert Combat Eidolon &mdash; Feat 12

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** Secrets of Magic pg. 77
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 2958
- **Prerequisites:** Summoner Dedication
- **Legacy Content**

Your eidolon advances its capabilities in combat. Your eidolon becomes an expert in unarmed attacks. If you are an expert in unarmored defense, your eidolon also becomes an expert in unarmored defense. If you have weapon specialization, your eidolon also gains weapon specialization.

---

## Expert Summoner Spellcasting &mdash; Feat 12

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** Secrets of Magic pg. 77
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 2959
- **Prerequisites:** Basic Summoner Spellcasting; master in the skill associated with your eidolon's tradition
- **Legacy Content**

You gain the expert bounded spellcasting benefits.

---

## Signature Synergy &mdash; Feat 14

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** Secrets of Magic pg. 77
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 2960
- **Prerequisites:** Advanced Synergy
- **Legacy Content**

Your eidolon gains an evolution integral to its form, and it comes more easily than your other synergies. You gain one evolution feat from the following list: Airborne Form, Burrowing Form, Ever-Vigilant Senses, or Hulking Size. For the purpose of meeting its prerequisites, your summoner level is equal to your character level – 4.

---

## Master Summoner Spellcasting &mdash; Feat 18

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** Secrets of Magic pg. 77
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 2961
- **Prerequisites:** Expert Summoner Spellcasting; legendary in the skill associated with your eidolon's tradition
- **Legacy Content**

You gain the master bounded spellcasting benefits.

---

---

# Thaumaturge (Multiclass Archetype)

Source: Dark Archives (Remastered) pg. 49
Archetype ID: 343

Scraps of knowledge have taught you how to exploit the vulnerabilities of creatures and the powers of mystical objects.

### Multiclass Thaumaturge Characters

Thaumaturge suits characters who want to glean strange knowledge. It's especially useful for those who tend to fight with one-handed weapons, like swashbucklers or rogues, since they have their other hand free for an implement.

---

## Thaumaturge Dedication &mdash; Feat 2

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype, Dedication, Multiclass
- **Source:** Dark Archives (Remastered) pg. 49
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 8398
- **Prerequisites:** Charisma +2

You've uncovered basic thaumaturgy. You become trained in thaumaturge class DC. Choose an implement; you can use it to Glimpse Vulnerability, but don't gain its benefits. You also gain a few esoterica, allowing you to use esoterica actions. You become trained in your choice of Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion; if you were already trained in these, you become trained in a skill of your choice. You gain the Glimpse Vulnerability action.

### Glimpse Vulnerability ◆ (1 action)
- **Traits:** Esoterica, Manipulate
- **Frequency:** once per round
- **Requirements:** You are holding your implement.

You glimpse a hidden vulnerability and then strengthen it to aid you. Select a creature you can see. Until you Glimpse Vulnerability again, that target gains weakness 2 against your unarmed and weapon Strikes.

- **Special:** You can't select another dedication feat until you have gained two other feats from the thaumaturge archetype.

---

## Basic Thaumaturgy &mdash; Feat 4

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** Dark Archives (Remastered) pg. 49
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 8399
- **Prerequisites:** Thaumaturge Dedication

You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level thaumaturge feat of your choice.

---

## Advanced Thaumaturgy &mdash; Feat 6

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** Dark Archives (Remastered) pg. 49
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 8400
- **Prerequisites:** Basic Thaumaturgy

You gain one thaumaturge feat. For the purpose of meeting its prerequisites, your thaumaturge level is equal to half your character level.

- **Special:** You can select this feat more than once. Each time you select it, you gain another thaumaturge feat.

---

## Implement Initiate &mdash; Feat 6

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** Dark Archives (Remastered) pg. 49
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 8401
- **Prerequisites:** Thaumaturge Dedication

Mastery of an implement is the sign of a studied thaumaturge. You gain your implement's initiate benefit. If the benefit affects the target of Exploit Vulnerability, for you it affects the target of Glimpse Vulnerability instead.

---

## Magical Knowledge &mdash; Feat 8

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** Dark Archives (Remastered) pg. 49
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 8402
- **Prerequisites:** Thaumaturge Dedication; trained in at least one of Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion

Increase your proficiency rank in one of these skills from expert to master and in another from trained to expert. You gain a skill feat associated with each of the skills you chose.

---

## Resolute &mdash; Feat 12

- **Actions:** —
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Source:** Dark Archives (Remastered) pg. 49
- **PFS:** Standard
- **AoN ID:** 8403
- **Prerequisites:** Thaumaturge Dedication; expert in Will

You've tempered your mind and become resolute against effects that strain your willpower. Your proficiency rank for Will saves increases to master.

---

---

| Class | AoN ID | Rarity | Prerequisites | Source |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Animist | 7219 | Common | Wis +2 | War of Immortals pg. 56 |
| Commander | 7886 | Common | Int +2 | Battlecry! pg. 52 |
| Exemplar | 7226 | Rare | Str +2 or Dex +2 | War of Immortals pg. 57 |
| Guardian | 7892 | Common | Str +2, Con +2 | Battlecry! pg. 53 |
| Gunslinger | 3215 | Uncommon | Dex +2 | Guns & Gears pg. 127 |
| Inventor | 3112 | Uncommon | Int +2 | Guns & Gears pg. 49 |
| Summoner | 2953 | Common | Cha 14 | Secrets of Magic pg. 76 |
| Thaumaturge | 8398 | Common | Cha +2 | Dark Archives (Rem.) pg. 49 |
